Chaos.Api.dll

Service responsible for managing animal operations, including creation, retrieval, deletion, and value calculation.

CalculateValue(AnimalResponse)

Calculates the value of an animal based on its stats and health condition.

Parameters

animal AnimalResponse

The animal whose value will be calculated.

Returns

double

The calculated value.

CreateAnimal(AnimalRequest, string)

Creates (buys) a new animal with random stats based on the given request(typeAnimal) and name.

public Task<AnimalResponse> CreateAnimal(AnimalRequest request, string name)

Parameters

request AnimalRequest

The request containing the animal type.

name string

The name of the animal. This parameter is required.

Returns

Task<AnimalResponse>

The created animal.

CreateIniticalAnimals(Guid)

Creates the initial set of animals (five animals). This operation should only be executed once.

public Task<List<AnimalResponse>> CreateIniticalAnimals(Guid Id)

Parameters

Id Guid

Returns

Task<List<AnimalResponse>>

A list of initial animals.

Creates a random animal with generated stats and name.

Returns

A new randomly generated animal.

The unique identifier of the animal.
